title:
How Not to Burn Out in December
with Prokhor Chaliapin?

detail.context: Ahead of the New Year season, the brand signed a contract with Prokhor Chaliapin.
detail.task: Develop a series of short viral video concepts for the brand's TikTok account, starring Prokhor Chaliapin.
detail.solution: In one day, we developed more than 10 video ideas that the client received positively and approved without edits. During an 8-hour shoot, the production team filmed almost all concepts, and the strongest videos were then handed over to the brand's SMM team for publication on TikTok.
